title: Advancement Enhancement
description: Reorganised vanilla advancements with a bunch of new vanilla-adjacent advancements included!
body:
## Advancement Enhancement
Enhances your experience with advancements by adding ~50 new advancements, and Mojang's advancements entirely reorganised into relevant tabs or progression paths.

Personally I feel Mojang needs to take more care for the organisation of their advancements, because it has become very messy yet it doesnt take much to tidy it all up using the method I went for.

I'm also not much of a fan of other people's advancement's datapacks because it either just does the same things that Mojang did or adds way too much and becomes overwhelming. So I had to make this datapack to make things tidier and not so overwhelming.

### New Features:
1. The Adventure Tab is cut into thirds, creating an **Adventure** tab, **Combat** tab, and **Villager** tab.
2. The Husbandry Tab is cut in half to seperate **Making Friends** with animals tab and (mostly) **Food** tab.
3. Most progression paths now go slightly more into depth without it being burdensome whilst also having good flow.
4. Several advancements have been moved around to better fit the theme that those advancements involved in.

## New Advancements:
### Story
- Heavy Metal: Obtain an Anvil
- Be Shearful: Use Shears to obtain wool from a sheep
- Hot Topic: Construct a furnace out of eight stone blocks
- Amending: Obtain or create a piece of gear with mending
- More Firepower: Obtain a Blast Furnace and Smoker
- Im Naming You...: Obtain a name tag
- Neapolitan: Obtain every type of stone
- Overpowered: Obtain an Enchanted Golden Apple
- Eye Spy: Craft an Eye of Ender using an Ender Pearl and Blaze Rod Powder
- Fruit on the Loom: Obtain the Thing
### Nether
- Better Than Diamonds: Use a smithing table to upgrade a tool
- The Core: Kill a wither and take its Nether Star
- Didn’t need that before...: Find a Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template
- Overhealing: Kill a zombie with healing potions
- A Taste of your own medicine: Kill a witch with magic
### End
- Introduced Species: Plant a chorus plant in the overworld
- Lingering Around: Kill a mob using a lingering potion
- Not Much To See Here: Explore every end biome
- Organisational Wizard: Dye a Shulker Box to be more organised
- Pigs Flying: Ride a levitating pig
- Tourist Attire: Wear a carved pumpkin in the End
- Where Are We?: Defend a village from a raid in the end
### Combat
- Do a Barrel Roll!: Get riptide on a trident
- I am Become Death: Kill every mob in the game atleast once
- Librarian: Obtain 15 bookshelves for powerful enchantments
- Overkill: Deal twelve hearts of damage in a single melee blow
- Stealth Is Optional: Kill the Warden
- Over-Overkill: Deal more than sixteen hearts of damage in a single melee blow
### Adventure
- Moskstraumen: Construct a Conduit in the ocean
- As Far as The Eye Can See: Discover every mountain biome
- Sail the 7 Seas: Discover every ocean biome
- Tomb Raider: Enter a ruin
### Villagers
- Exotic Goods: Trade with a swamp and jungle villager
- Dry Spell: Dry a sponge in a furnace
- Meet the Engineer: Use an Iron Ingot to repair a damaged Iron Golem
- Feeling Ill: Defeat an Evoker in a Woodland Mansion
- Frequent Trader: Trade with every type of villager career
- The Haggler: Get 30 emeralds
- Monumental: Find an Ocean Monument
- Sign Of Evil: Find a Woodland Mansion
- Stonks: Trade with a villager at master level
- Treasure Hunter: Trade for an Explorer Map
### Husbandry
- Bake Bread: Grow wheat and use it to bake bread
- Cookie Time!: Bake some cookies
- Delicious Fish: Cook and eat a fish!
- I Baked You a Pie!: Bake a pumpkin pie
- The Lie: Wheat, sugar, milk and eggs!
### Friends
- Artificial Selection: Breed a horse and a donkey to get a mule
- From Mali to Egypt: Ride a Camel
- Rainbow Collection: Gather all 16 colors of wool
- Saddle Up: Tame a horse by jumping on it over and over again
- Extra Protection: Obtain wolf armor using armadillo scutes
